title: Marcus Ford Homicide (11/17/2018) & James Reed Prosecution — Full Investigative File

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, MCL 15.231 et seq., I request copies of the following records related to the homicide of Marcus Ford (DOB redacted per your policy; age 32 at death), which occurred on or about November 17, 2018 at approximately 1:30 AM on Douglas Avenue in Kalamazoo, Michigan. A suspect, James Reed, was convicted of first-degree premeditated murder, two counts of felony firearm, and felon-in-possession on April 21, 2026.

With the case now resolved at the trial stage, I respectfully request the following records, which I understand are no longer protected by the MCL 15.243(1)(b)(i) "ongoing investigation" exemption:

1. All incident reports, supplemental reports, and follow-up investigative reports related to the November 17, 2018 shooting death of Marcus Ford.
2. Computer-Aided Dispatch (CAD) records and printouts for all units responding to or associated with this incident.
3. 911 call audio recordings and transcripts related to this incident.
4. Crime scene photographs and diagrams.
5. Any body-worn camera (BWC), in-car/dashcam, or other audio-visual recordings captured by KDPS personnel at the scene, during follow-up interviews, during the arrest of James Reed, or during any post-arrest interrogation.
6. Witness statements and recorded interviews (audio or video), redacted as necessary to protect witness identity.
7. Press releases, official statements, and public-facing media advisories issued by KDPS regarding this case from 2018 through the present.
8. Ballistics and firearms examination reports.
9. Autopsy photographs are NOT requested; the autopsy/medical examiner's report itself (if in KDPS possession) IS requested.
10. Evidence logs and chain-of-custody records for physical evidence collected at the scene.

If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption relied upon and release all reasonably segregable non-exempt portions. I request records in electronic format (PDF, WAV/MP3 for audio, MP4 for video) delivered via email or download link to keep costs minimal.

I am a journalist/independent researcher and this request is in the public interest. If fees are expected to exceed $25, please contact me before processing so I can narrow the scope or request a fee waiver under MCL 15.234(1).

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,
Ka Yi Lo

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ka Yi Lo
